name: medieval_tavern
setting_pool: A crowded medieval tavern at night
A smoky tavern room lit by hearth fire
A waypoint inn on a muddy road
A drafty great hall with trestle tables

background_pool.text: The interior of {setting}, heavy exposed oak beams spanning a low ceiling blackened by decades of smoke, rough-hewn tables and benches crowded together, the glow of the hearth casting long shadows across the room
The close confines of {setting}, haze from the hearth fire pooling against the low ceiling, condensation on the rough plaster walls, the press of warm bodies and spilled ale
The worn common room of {setting}, rough floorboards dark with age and stains, a few narrow windows letting in cold drafts, the bar lined with mismatched earthenware mugs
The cavernous space of {setting}, high ceiling supported by heavy arched wooden beams, a central hearth smoking into a roof gap, trestle tables arranged in long rows
The dim storage areas behind {setting}, low vaulted stone ceiling requiring a stoop, barrels and sacks stacked against walls, a single tallow candle providing meager light
The bench-and-table corner of {setting}, a clay jug and half-eaten trencher at arm's reach, the grain of the oak table scarred by knife marks, a dog sleeping beneath the bench
The hearth of {setting}, iron spit and blackened cauldron, flames licking against soot-stained stonework, the face of the fire casting a warm pulsing glow on everything within a few feet
The bar and serving area of {setting}, tapped barrels ranged along the back wall, a bored keeper polishing mugs, the scratched and stained counter separating staff from patrons

The full hall of {setting} during a busy evening, patrons and serving staff moving between tables, the room abuzz with conversation and the clatter of earthenware, minstrels tuning instruments in the corner
The exterior courtyard of {setting} at dusk, rough stone walls glowing amber in the last light, horses tethered at a post, warm firelight spilling from the open doorway and shuttered windows

subject_pool: a tavern keeper wiping down the bar
a traveling merchant in road-worn finery
a hooded mercenary nursing an ale
a serving girl carrying a tray of tankards
a bard tuning a lute by the fire
a grizzled hunter at a corner table
a knight errant in dented armor
a cook in a flour-dusted apron
a traveling merchant with a heavy purse
a stablehand lingering near the door
a off-duty guard still wearing chainmail
action_pool: draining a tankard and slamming it down
leaning back with a tired sigh
haggling over a map spread on the table
quietly picking at a plate of stew
gazing into the fire, lost in thought
sharpening a blade with a whetstone
draining a tankard in long gulps
leaning back in a chair, boots on the table
